message:
docs(readme): note merge_asof returns MergedDataFrame in recipe (br-x8r65 / fd90.137)

fd90.137: Merge-Asof recipe at lines 1336-1342 bound merge_asof result
without noting it's a MergedDataFrame, not a DataFrame:

  let result = merge_asof(&trades, &quotes, "timestamp",
                          AsofDirection::Backward)?;

But merge_asof returns Result<MergedDataFrame, JoinError>. MergedDataFrame
is a struct with public 'index' + 'columns' fields but NO impl block.
A user calling result.column("quote") hits:
  error[E0599]: no method named 'column' found for struct 'MergedDataFrame'

The Merge: Advanced Options section already has this note (from
fd90.113); this parallel recipe was missed.

Fix: rename the binding to 'merged', show DataFrame::new(merged.index,
merged.columns)? to get a usable DataFrame, and add inline-comment
documentation of the MergedDataFrame return contract — matching the
exact pattern in the Merge: Advanced Options section for consistency.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
